footnotes.text: Test the spirits: the expression probably refers to those Christians who claimed extraordinary gifts of the Holy Spirit. These spirits should be examined to see whether their teaching is in agreement with Catholic faith and the doctrine of Christ and His Church.

There is no fear in love: perfect love banishes human, doubtful and servile, fear. It does not, however, exclude the wholesome fear of God's judgments, nor the fear and trembling with which man must work out his salvation (Phil. 2, 12).
